name: High-Qualified Leads Email Summary
description: Read Google Sheets leads tab, deterministic field-name map (post-WP-SR rows_to_objects + WP-28 source-side positional fallback for bare numeric keys), filter by Stage=4, AI generate HTML summary table (or 'no data' fallback), send summary email to recipient list. Tests Sheets-to-objects conversion + filter + AI HTML rendering. Prerequisite: destination sheet has a header row (WP-26 workaround).
